metrics.title: Lumen Tidy | Thoughtful Cleaning for Home and Work
metrics.bodyText:
Home
About us
Services
Testimonials
Get a quote

BRIGHT SPACES. LIGHTER DAYS.

Come Home to Clean Without Giving Up Your Day.

Reliable, detail-minded cleaning for homes and workplaces—planned around your routine and finished with care.

Plan your cleaning
→
Explore services

ABOUT LUMEN TIDY

Careful Cleaning for Healthier, Happier Spaces
4.9/5
Average rating
100%
Care guarantee

We combine trained people, practical checklists, and surface-safe products to give every room a consistent finish. Choose a one-time reset or a routine that keeps life moving.

Build my cleaning plan →

WHAT WE DO

Cleaning Services Made to Fit Real Life

Clear plans, thoughtful professionals, and the right level of care for every kind of space.

A Home That Feels Reset
$89

A dependable room-by-room clean for busy weeks, special weekends, or the moment your space needs breathing room.

Request this service
→
The Deep-Clean Difference
$169

Detailed attention for kitchens, bathrooms, bedrooms, and the often-missed places where dust settles in.

Request this service
→
Move With Less Stress
$219

A careful clean before the boxes arrive or after the last key turns, so every transition begins on a fresh note.

Request this service
→
Workspaces Ready for Work
$149

Flexible office care that keeps shared rooms polished, comfortable, and ready for clients and teams.

Request this service
→

OUR PEOPLE

Meet the Team Behind the Details

Friendly, trained professionals who arrive prepared and treat every space with respect.

Maya Brooks
Home Care Lead

Known for calm arrivals and a sharp eye for finishing details.

in
◎
✦
Elena Cruz
Quality Coordinator

Keeps every checklist consistent from first room to final walk-through.

in
◎
✦
Nina Patel
Deep-Clean Specialist

Takes on high-detail resets with thoughtful, surface-safe methods.

in
◎
✦
Marcus Reed
Commercial Care Lead

Plans efficient routines that respect working hours and busy teams.

in
◎
✦
Sofia Lane
Client Care Manager

Makes scheduling simple and turns special requests into clear plans.

in
◎
✦
Noah Bennett
Move Service Lead

Brings order and steady pacing to move-in and move-out days.

in
◎
✦

CLIENT NOTES

Why Clients Make Us Part of Their Routine

Reliable timing, careful work, and a finish that feels immediately different.

● ● ●
4.9 from local clients
“
Lumen Tidy made the whole house feel lighter. The team was thoughtful, punctual, and incredibly thorough without disrupting our day.
Amelia R.
Recurring Home Care
“
Our move-out clean was the easiest part of moving. Every room was ready for inspection, and communication stayed clear throughout.
Jordan M.
Move-Out Cleaning
“
The office looks polished every Monday morning. They work around our schedule and never miss the small details clients notice.
Priya K.
Office Care
“
I booked a deep clean before family arrived and the result was excellent. Even the hard-to-reach areas looked refreshed.
Daniel S.
Deep Cleaning
“
Friendly people, a simple quote, and a spotless finish. I finally found a cleaning team I can confidently book again.
Camila T.
One-Time Home Care
←
5 / 5
→

CONTACT US

Tell Us What You’d Like to Feel Clean Again

Share your space, timing, and priorities. We’ll reply with a straightforward plan.

Call for a quote
+1 (555) 014-2890
Service area
Homes and workplaces across the metro area
